title: clear sword
description: This mod provides you with extremely powerful weapons and armor
body:
This mod provides you with extremely powerful weapons and armor.
1.clear sword:∞ attack damage,∞ attack speed,Block 15 attack range,Durability: unbreakable, Press and hold the left mouse button to dash forward.

2.power moon

3.incas star

4.armor Inca moon,∞ armor,∞ armor touhgness,∞ knockback resistanc,Reflective armor that reflects all incoming damage back to the attacker,+1000000000 health,Wearing armor, you can fly in survival mode.
